title: "Rich Men North of Richmond" hits #1, upward mobility, real estate capital crunch, Trump RICO
description:
(0:00) Sacks' big night

(2:56) Sacks on spirits

(14:27) "Rich Men North of Richmond" goes viral and debuts at #1 on Apple Music, upward mobility issues in America, solutions

(53:01) Michael Burry's bet against the market: overblown?

(58:33) Real estate capital crunch

(1:12:26) Trump's newest indictment

(1:23:31) What Adyen's big drop means for Stripe's valuation

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses their viral song 'Rich Men North of Richmond', upward mobility in America, and various financial topics including Michael Burry's market bet and real estate capital crunch. They also touch on Trump's indictment and Adyen's impact on Stripe's valuation.

takeaways.text: Upward mobility is a significant issue in America
Michael Burry's market bet may be overblown
Real estate capital crunch is a growing concern
Adyen's valuation drop affects Stripe's valuation
Wall Street is ready to invest in cheap commercial real estate
The hosts discuss solutions to America's upward mobility issues

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss both positive and negative topics, including their viral song and Trump's indictment, resulting in a mixed sentiment.

notable_moments.description: Rich Men North of Richmond debuts at #1 on Apple Music
